Title: Add new user with valid data
Preconditions: 1. Backend server running on port 5000 | 2. Frontend running on port 3000 | 3. Database initialized with user_management table | 4. Navigate to /users page
Steps: 1. Enter valid name in Name field | 2. Select valid date of birth (18+ years old) | 3. Enter valid address (min 10 characters) | 4. Click "Add User" button | 5. Observe form submission and table update
Test Data: Name: "John Doe" | DOB: "1990-01-15" | Address: "123 Main Street, New York, NY 10001"
Expected Result: 1. Success message "User added successfully!" displayed | 2. Form fields cleared after submission | 3. New user appears in the table below with correct data | 4. Table header shows updated count | 5. User data persisted in database

Title: Complete user management workflow
Preconditions: 1. Fresh database state | 2. All services running | 3. Navigate to landing page
Steps: 1. Click "Users" link in navigation | 2. Verify user management page loads | 3. Add first user with valid data | 4. Verify user appears in table | 5. Add second user | 6. Verify both users displayed | 7. Navigate back to landing page | 8. Return to /users and verify data persists
Test Data: User 1: Name="Alice Smith", DOB="1985-06-20", Address="456 Oak Avenue, Los Angeles, CA" | User 2: Name="Bob Johnson", DOB="1992-11-10", Address="789 Pine Road, Chicago, IL"
Expected Result: 1. Navigation between pages works correctly | 2. All users displayed after page reload | 3. Data persisted across navigation | 4. Table shows correct user count | 5. No data loss or duplication

Title: Submit form with minimum valid values
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. Form is empty
Steps: 1. Enter 2-character name | 2. Enter DOB exactly 18 years ago | 3. Enter 10-character address | 4. Submit form
Expected Result: 1. Form validates successfully | 2. User added to database | 3. Minimum length requirements satisfied | 4. No validation errors shown

Title: Submit form with maximum realistic values
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. Form is empty
Steps: 1. Enter very long name (100+ chars) | 2. Enter very old DOB (100 years ago) | 3. Enter very long address (500+ chars) | 4. Submit form
Test Data: Name: "[100 character name with spaces and hyphens]" | DOB: "1924-01-01" | Address: "[500 character address]"
Expected Result: 1. Form accepts long values | 2. Data stored correctly in database | 3. Table displays data without overflow issues | 4. No truncation or errors

Title: Submit with special characters in name
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. Form is empty
Steps: 1. Enter name with apostrophes and hyphens | 2. Enter valid DOB | 3. Enter valid address | 4. Submit form
Test Data: Name: "Mary O'Brien-Smith" | DOB: "1988-03-15" | Address: "123 Main Street, Boston, MA"
Expected Result: 1. Name with special characters accepted | 2. Validation passes | 3. User saved with correct name formatting | 4. Special characters preserved in database and display

Title: Submit with international address characters
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. Form is empty
Steps: 1. Enter valid name | 2. Enter valid DOB | 3. Enter address with accented/international characters | 4. Submit form
Test Data: Name: "Carlos Rodriguez" | DOB: "1991-07-22" | Address: "Calle José María, São Paulo, Brasil"
Expected Result: 1. International characters accepted | 2. Address saved correctly | 3. Characters displayed properly in table | 4. No encoding issues

Title: Navigate to users page from landing page
Preconditions: 1. On landing page (/) | 2. Not logged into any page
Steps: 1. Locate "Users" link in top navigation | 2. Click "Users" link | 3. Observe page transition
Expected Result: 1. Page navigates to /users route | 2. User management page loads successfully | 3. Page shows heading "User Management" | 4. Form and table sections visible | 5. URL changes to /users

Title: Navigate to users page from customer form
Preconditions: 1. On customer form page (/form) | 2. Form may be partially filled
Steps: 1. Locate "Users" button in top-right navigation bar | 2. Click "Users" button | 3. Verify navigation
Expected Result: 1. Successfully navigates to /users | 2. User management page loads | 3. No data loss warning needed (different feature) | 4. Navigation smooth without errors

Title: Navigate to users page from KYC page
Preconditions: 1. On KYC page (/kyc) | 2. May have form data entered
Steps: 1. Locate "Users" button in top-right navigation bar | 2. Click "Users" button | 3. Observe navigation
Expected Result: 1. Successfully navigates to /users route | 2. Page loads correctly | 3. All users displayed if any exist | 4. Form ready for input

Title: Return to landing page from users page
Preconditions: 1. On /users page
Steps: 1. Click browser back button or navigate to / | 2. Verify landing page loads
Expected Result: 1. Landing page loads successfully | 2. All landing page features visible | 3. Users link still present in navigation | 4. No errors in navigation

Title: Submit empty form
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. All form fields empty
Steps: 1. Click "Add User" button without entering data | 2. Observe validation messages
Expected Result: 1. Form submission prevented | 2. Error message displayed: "Name is required" | 3. Name field highlighted with red border | 4. No API call made | 5. No database record created

Title: Submit with name less than 2 characters
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. Form empty
Steps: 1. Enter single character in Name field | 2. Enter valid DOB and address | 3. Submit form
Test Data: Name: "A" | DOB: "1990-05-10" | Address: "123 Main Street, NY"
Expected Result: 1. Validation error shown: "Name must be at least 2 characters" | 2. Submission blocked | 3. Name field has error styling | 4. DOB and address remain filled

Title: Submit with name containing numbers
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. Form empty
Steps: 1. Enter name with numbers | 2. Enter valid DOB and address | 3. Submit form
Test Data: Name: "John123" | DOB: "1990-05-10" | Address: "123 Main Street, NY"
Expected Result: 1. Validation error: "Name can only contain letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes" | 2. Form not submitted | 3. Name field highlighted | 4. Clear error message displayed

Title: Submit with date of birth in the future
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. Form empty
Steps: 1. Enter valid name | 2. Select future date in DOB field | 3. Enter valid address | 4. Submit form
Test Data: Name: "Jane Doe" | DOB: "[Tomorrow's date]" | Address: "456 Oak Ave, LA, CA"
Expected Result: 1. Validation error: "Date of birth must be in the past" | 2. Submission prevented | 3. DOB field highlighted | 4. Other valid fields retained

Title: Submit with age less than 18 years
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. Form empty
Steps: 1. Enter valid name | 2. Enter DOB less than 18 years ago | 3. Enter valid address | 4. Submit form
Test Data: Name: "Minor User" | DOB: "[Today - 17 years]" | Address: "789 Pine Road, Chicago, IL"
Expected Result: 1. Error message: "You must be at least 18 years old" | 2. Form not submitted | 3. DOB field shows error styling | 4. Age requirement clearly enforced

Title: Submit with address less than 10 characters
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. Form empty
Steps: 1. Enter valid name | 2. Enter valid DOB | 3. Enter short address (< 10 chars) | 4. Submit form
Expected Result: 1. Validation error: "Address must be at least 10 characters" | 2. Submission blocked | 3. Address field highlighted | 4. Minimum length requirement enforced

Title: Submit with missing DOB field
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. Form empty
Steps: 1. Enter valid name | 2. Leave DOB empty | 3. Enter valid address | 4. Submit form
Test Data: Name: "Test User" | DOB: "" | Address: "123 Main Street, NY"
Expected Result: 1. Error: "Date of birth is required" | 2. Form validation fails | 3. DOB field highlighted | 4. Other fields retain data

Title: Handle API server error during submission
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. Backend server returns 500 error
Steps: 1. Enter all valid form data | 2. Submit form | 3. API returns error response
Test Data: Name: "Valid User" | DOB: "1990-01-01" | Address: "123 Main St" | API Error: Server Error
Expected Result: 1. Error message displayed: "An error occurred while adding the user" | 2. Form data preserved | 3. User can retry submission | 4. No partial data saved | 5. Graceful error handling

Title: Handle network timeout during user fetch
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. Network request fails or times out
Steps: 1. Page loads | 2. API fetch fails | 3. Observe behavior
Expected Result: 1. Page still renders without crashing | 2. Empty state message shown | 3. Form remains functional | 4. Error logged to console | 5. Graceful degradation

Title: Submit duplicate user data
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. User with same name/DOB/address exists
Steps: 1. Enter data matching existing user | 2. Submit form | 3. Observe handling
Test Data: Name: "[Existing Name]" | DOB: "[Existing DOB]" | Address: "[Existing Address]"
Expected Result: 1. System allows duplicate entry (no unique constraint defined) OR shows appropriate message if constraint added | 2. Both users visible in table | 3. Each has unique ID | 4. Behavior matches requirements

Title: Brand verification - Oktawave colors
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. DevTools open for color inspection
Steps: 1. Inspect primary action buttons | 2. Check link colors | 3. Verify table header colors | 4. Check error/success message colors | 5. Inspect active states
Expected Result: 1. Primary color #2DB5DA used for user links and active states | 2. Secondary color #939598 used for descriptions and muted text | 3. Success messages use green tones | 4. Error messages use red tones | 5. Brand colors consistent across page

Title: Typography verification - Proxima Nova/Montserrat
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. DevTools open
Steps: 1. Inspect page heading font | 2. Check form labels font | 3. Verify table text font | 4. Check button font | 5. Inspect body text font
Expected Result: 1. Headings use Montserrat font family | 2. Body text uses Proxima Nova with Montserrat fallback | 3. Font weights appropriate (600-700 for headings) | 4. Typography consistent with brand guidelines | 5. Fallback fonts load if primary unavailable

Title: Mobile responsive design verification
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. Browser width set to 375px (mobile)
Steps: 1. Resize browser to mobile width | 2. Verify form layout | 3. Check table responsiveness | 4. Test navigation buttons | 5. Submit form on mobile view
Expected Result: 1. Form fields stack vertically | 2. Table scrolls horizontally or adapts | 3. Buttons remain accessible | 4. Text readable without zoom | 5. Navigation functional on small screens

Title: Table displays multiple users correctly
Preconditions: 1. Database has 5+ users | 2. On /users page
Steps: 1. Page loads | 2. Observe table rendering | 3. Scroll through users | 4. Check data accuracy
Expected Result: 1. All users displayed in table | 2. Data matches database records | 3. Table header shows correct count "All Users (5)" | 4. Columns aligned properly | 5. Dates formatted consistently

Title: Date formatting in table display
Preconditions: 1. Users exist with various DOBs | 2. On /users page
Steps: 1. Observe date display format in table | 2. Check consistency across rows
Expected Result: 1. Dates displayed in readable format (e.g., "January 15, 1990") | 2. Format consistent for all date columns | 3. Both DOB and Created At dates formatted | 4. Timezone handled correctly

Title: Submit form rapidly multiple times
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. Form filled with valid data
Steps: 1. Click submit button multiple times rapidly | 2. Observe button state | 3. Check database for duplicates
Expected Result: 1. Submit button disabled after first click | 2. Only one API request sent | 3. No duplicate records created | 4. Button re-enabled after response | 5. Proper loading state shown

Title: Form behavior with very slow network
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. Throttle network to slow 3G
Steps: 1. Fill form with valid data | 2. Submit form | 3. Observe loading states | 4. Wait for completion
Test Data: Valid user data with network throttling
Expected Result: 1. Loading indicator shown during submission | 2. Button shows "Adding..." text | 3. Form remains disabled during request | 4. Success message shown after completion | 5. No timeout errors

Title: XSS attempt in name field
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. Form empty
Steps: 1. Enter script tag in name field | 2. Enter valid DOB and address | 3. Submit form
Expected Result: 1. Validation rejects name with invalid characters | 2. Error message shown | 3. Script not executed | 4. Input sanitized | 5. Security maintained

Title: SQL injection attempt in address field
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. Form empty
Steps: 1. Enter valid name and DOB | 2. Enter SQL injection string in address | 3. Submit form
Test Data: Name: "Test User" | DOB: "1990-01-01" | Address: "'; DROP TABLE user_management;--"
Expected Result: 1. Address accepted as plain text | 2. Parameterized queries prevent injection | 3. User saved safely | 4. Database tables intact | 5. No SQL execution

Title: Success message auto-dismisses
Preconditions: 1. On /users page | 2. Form filled with valid data
Steps: 1. Submit form successfully | 2. Observe success message | 3. Wait 3+ seconds | 4. Check message visibility
Expected Result: 1. Success message appears after submission | 2. Message visible for ~3 seconds | 3. Message disappears automatically | 4. No manual dismissal required | 5. User experience smooth
